entry.title: BILL028(26) (Honolulu): MAYOR → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE LEGISLATIVE BUDGET FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Legislative Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Status: MAYOR → PUBLISH

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL028(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE LEGISLATIVE BUDGET FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Legislative Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site
